budgeting_rules.name: 50/30/20 Rule
budgeting_rules.description: Allocate 50% to needs, 30% to wants, 20% to savings

budgeting_rules.name: Emergency Fund
budgeting_rules.description: Maintain 3-6 months of expenses in liquid savings

budgeting_rules.name: Debt Snowball
budgeting_rules.description: Pay off smallest debts first for psychological momentum

savings_benchmarks.advice: Critical: savings rate below 5%. Reduce discretionary spending immediately.
Below average savings rate. Consider automating savings transfers.
Good progress. Aim for 20%+ to accelerate wealth building.

investment_allocations.medium: 60% index funds / 25% bonds / 10% growth stocks / 5% cash
investment_allocations.high: 70% growth stocks / 20% index funds / 5% crypto / 5% alternatives

risk_profile_guidance.low: Focus on capital preservation. Treasury bonds, CDs, and high-yield savings accounts.
risk_profile_guidance.medium: Balanced approach. Diversified index funds with some bond allocation.
risk_profile_guidance.high: Growth-oriented. Aggressive equity allocation with alternative investments.
